# Crework Labs
> MVP development studio for startup founders. Bengaluru, India. AI-powered builds, market research upfront.

## Core services
- MVP Development: We build launch-ready MVPs in 4-8 weeks.
- Landing Page Design: Conversion-focused landing pages for startups.
- Business Automation: AI workflows that save founders time.

## Highest-value blog posts
- MVP Cost in 2026: https://www.creworklabs.com/blog/mvp-cost-2026
- Rebuild or Iterate Your MVP: https://www.creworklabs.com/blog/rebuild-or-iterate-mvp
- AI Automations Every Founder Should Use in 2026: https://www.creworklabs.com/blog/ai-automations-founders-2026
- Subreddits to launch your product: https://www.creworklabs.com/blog/subreddits-to-launch-product
- MVP Feature List: https://www.creworklabs.com/blog/mvp-feature-list
